prompt: Category 5 - Coverage Integrity. Evaluation mode request: Generate TestSuite and CoverageMap. StoryID=SYNTH-C5-001; AC1 READY enables Download. AC2 PENDING disables Download. AC3 FAILED disables Download.
expected_response: Should map every AC to at least one test and every test back to at least one AC. CoverageMap should show AC1, AC2, and AC3 covered.

prompt: Category 5 - Coverage Integrity. Evaluation mode request: Generate coverage for high-risk Data/DB/API behavior. StoryID=SYNTH-C5-002; AC1 Given API stores normalized address, database stores uppercase street and city values.
expected_response: Should treat Data/DB/API as high-risk and generate at least two tests when source evidence supports it, such as API response and DB persistence verification.

prompt: Category 5 - Coverage Integrity. Evaluation mode request: Generate TestSuite from ACs and business rules. StoryID=SYNTH-C5-003; AC1 unsupported payment method is rejected. BusinessRules=Unsupported methods must not call authorization.
expected_response: Should include coverage for both AC1 rejection and the business-rule no-authorization behavior. Should trace the no-authorization test to the business rule.

prompt: Category 5 - Coverage Integrity. Evaluation mode request: Generate coverage when one AC is untestable. StoryID=SYNTH-C5-004; AC1 System works well. AC2 Given status Active, only active records display.
expected_response: Should mark AC1 as untestable/ambiguous in CoverageGap or TBDLog and cover AC2. Should not claim 100 percent coverage unless AC1 is explicitly excluded with a gap.

prompt: Category 5 - Coverage Integrity. Evaluation mode request: Generate RTM and CoverageMap for three stories with shared requirements. Source packet includes Story A AC1 payment validation, Story B AC1 payment authorization unavailable, Story C AC1 payment confirmation.
expected_response: Should preserve story-level traceability and not merge requirements across stories unless explicitly linked. RTM should show each story, AC, and test mapping.
